title: Recurring reminders with cron scheduling and Claude invocation
description: Upgrade the reminder system to support repeating/recurring reminders with cron expressions. When fired, trigger full Claude CLI invocations with all MCP tools available.
acceptanceCriteria: User can say 'set a daily reminder at 8am to check the weather' and a recurring reminder is created with cron expression
Recurring reminders fire at the correct times and trigger Claude with full tool access
Claude's response is sent to the group via Signal
Users can list and cancel recurring reminders
All existing one-shot reminder functionality continues to work unchanged
